component.name: BENTERM
component.summary: Attention-friendly terminal distro for AI coding sessions

description.p: BENTERM is a cross-platform terminal tuned for AI coding sessions with Codex, Claude, and other terminal agents. It bundles 0xProto, ships a curated dark-theme shuffle-bag, plays per-pane sound cues when an agent is ready for the next prompt, and routes attention through visual pulses and click-to-focus toast notifications.
Configuration is expressed in Lua. BENTERM ships an opinionated default config so a fresh machine is ready out of the box, while still exposing every Lua hook for personal customization.

Designed to be paired with HyperYap for speech-to-text, smart paste, and clipboard intelligence — BENTERM owns the terminal-side surface (sound, attention, readability, clickable paths) and stays out of HyperYap's way.
See the GitHub release notes for the full changelog.
